title: Soartex Fantastik
description: Minecraft more realistic, smooth, and clean.
body:
Soartex Fantastik is a blend of Soartex Fanver and Fantastik textures, bringing modern features to classic Soartex textures, such as bushy leaves, PBR (shader support) textures, 3D models and textures (POM), and many others.

The pack aims to make Minecraft more realistic and detailed while maintaining simplicity, a polished look, and good performance.

![Soartex Fantastik Gold and Obsidian Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d8096613181264d8210303069ab823d70b06eac.jpeg)

<details>
<summary>Does Soartex Fantastik have the right to use textures from Soar49's?</summary>

Yes, Soartex is in the public domain. Soar49 said: "You mix soartex,can create a continuation and can distribute. And, a customizer iscontinued and it can release to the public freely.

The original forum post where Soar49 gives permission to use his textures: https://web.archive.org/web/20140324175910/http://www.minecraftforum.net/topic/150915-64x64beta18119pre4-soartex-hd-smooth-texture-pack-wip-customizer/

</details>
